sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16836" key="a)su/ntatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσύν-τᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τείνω</etym>) <sense id="n16836.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἄστυτος</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0518.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenarch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n16836.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without exertion,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">περίπατος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:21:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.21.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
